summary: Added an idempotent iPhone SE simulator provisioning helper and Makefile targets for the smallest-width localization regression prerequisite. The helper chooses the latest available iOS runtime that supports an iPhone SE device type, creates a simulator named `iPhone SE` when missing, and provides a read-only check target for validation. This host now has `iPhone SE` provisioned on iOS 26.5, so the smallest-width localization regression slice is queued.

contract_status_changes.before: `app-localization-smallest-width-accessibility-regression` was blocked because the dev/CI host had no simulator named `iPhone SE`.
contract_status_changes.after: The repo has a repeatable provision/check helper, this host has `iPhone SE` on iOS 26.5, and the smallest-width localization regression slice is queued.

residual_risks: The next slice still needs to add and run `make ui-regression DOMAIN=localization-smallest-width`; this slice only provisioned and checked the simulator prerequisite.
recommended_next_reason: The iPhone SE simulator prerequisite is now satisfied and the blocked smallest-width regression slice has been moved to queued.
